title: Bridging conda and PyPI ecosystems: install PyPI packages with conda install
description: Stop reaching for `pip` inside your conda environments. With the conda-pypi beta, `conda install` can now pull pure Python packages from PyPI directly, alongside your conda packages in a single solve.

title: May 2026 Releases
description: May releases of conda and conda-build are out—native lockfiles, a snappier CLI, v1 recipe builds improvements and conda-pypi. 🎉

title: Conda and pip are two ecosystems, not just tools
description: `conda` and `pip` are two parallel ecosystems trying to solve different problems rather than two competing tools

title: Building a Better conda CLI: A Vision
description: A vision for the conda CLI in 2026: making conda fast, trusted, and delightful.

title: March 2026 Releases
description: conda 26.3.x, conda-build 26.3.0, conda-libmamba-solver 26.3.0, conda-content-trust 0.3.0, constructor 3.15.x, conda-pypi 0.5/0.6, and more have shipped! 🎉
